tagline: Wizarding-world operations — Hogwarts to the Ministry of Magic

account.name: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft & Wizardry (Test Data)

serviceLines.name: HP: Strategy & Advisory
serviceLines.description: Headmaster-tier strategic engagements. Discovery, roadmaps, executive advisory.

serviceLines.name: HP: Implementation
serviceLines.description: Build + delivery houses. Greenfield platforms, integrations, migrations.

serviceLines.name: HP: Managed Services
serviceLines.description: Long-running operational engagements. Retainer-style ongoing support.

serviceLines.name: HP: Data & Analytics
serviceLines.description: Insight engagements. BI, dashboards, time-turner archive analysis.

serviceLines.name: HP: Knowledge & Training
serviceLines.description: Enablement engagements. Curriculum delivery, knowledge transfer, documentation.

roles.name: Hogwarts Headmaster (SA)
roles.description: Keeper of the school's deep magic — designs the over-arching solution and watches over its integrity.

roles.name: Head of House (PM)
roles.description: Marshals the prefects of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to the Headmaster.

roles.name: Senior Auror (SCC)
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft — leads the build phase.

roles.name: Apprentice Wizard (CC)
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the senior wand's eye.

roles.name: Daily Prophet Scribe (BA)
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal customer and the wizarding craft.

roles.name: Hogsmeade Crier (SMCC)
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert across the wizarding villages.

_realmNotes: Harry Potter realms span the wizarding world: Hogwarts operations (hogwarts-castle, chamber-of-secrets, quidditch-stadium), Ministry + Diagon (ministry-of-magic, diagon-alley, gringotts-bank), magical creature + secret arts (forbidden-forest, department-of-mysteries), and apprentice training (wizarding-academy as pre-sales).

realms.projectName: Ministry of Magic — Long-term Records Watch

prepayments.notes: Up-front galleon escrow on contract signature.

hogwarts-castle.name: Sorting Ceremony
hogwarts-castle.description: Discovery sign-off — students sorted into houses.

hogwarts-castle.name: Term Begins
hogwarts-castle.description: Build kickoff: curriculum live, classrooms warded.

hogwarts-castle.name: End-of-Year Exams
hogwarts-castle.description: Phase invoice trigger: OWLs and NEWTs.

hogwarts-castle.name: Summer Break Handoff
hogwarts-castle.description: Hyper-care close: castle stewards take over.

chamber-of-secrets.name: Basilisk Confirmed
chamber-of-secrets.description: Build phase: creature identified, plan drafted.

chamber-of-secrets.name: Sword of Gryffindor Drawn
chamber-of-secrets.description: UAT gate: weapon retrieved from the hat.

chamber-of-secrets.name: Final Billing
chamber-of-secrets.description: Final invoice from the chamber operation.

tasks.name: Gather at the Great Hall
tasks.description: Run the kickoff workshop and align on scope, roles, and timeline.

tasks.name: Research in the Restricted Section
tasks.description: Gather and document requirements with the client stakeholders.

tasks.name: Brew the Plan
tasks.description: Produce the solution design and review it with the client.

tasks.name: Cast the Spells
tasks.description: Build and configure the solution per the approved design.

tasks.name: O.W.L. Examinations
tasks.description: Run user acceptance testing and triage the feedback.

tasks.name: The Battle of Hogwarts
tasks.description: Execute the go-live cutover and confirm production readiness.

tasks.name: Establish the Order
tasks.description: Stand up the managed-service environment and runbooks.

tasks.name: Convene the Order of the Phoenix
tasks.description: Hold the service kickoff and confirm SLAs and escalation paths.

tasks.name: Charm the Wards
tasks.description: Implement monitoring, automation, and support processes.

tasks.name: Pass the Headmaster's Wand
tasks.description: Transition the service into active management.

tasks.name: Meeting in the Headmaster's Office
tasks.description: Stabilize the service and review the first support cycle.

tasks.name: Form Dumbledore's Army
tasks.description: Kick off the initiative and confirm goals and owners.

tasks.name: Consult the Library
tasks.description: Assess the current state and define success criteria.

tasks.name: Plan in the Room of Requirement
tasks.description: Draft the approach and circulate it for internal review.

tasks.name: The Quest
tasks.description: Execute the work and track progress to plan.

tasks.name: Lift the Enchantment
tasks.description: Roll out internally and communicate the change.

tasks.name: A Word with Dumbledore
tasks.description: Align with the stakeholder on scope and deadline.

tasks.name: Owl from the Ministry
tasks.description: Capture the requirements for the deliverable.

tasks.name: Complete the Task
tasks.description: Complete the deliverable.

tasks.name: Report to the Headmaster
tasks.description: Deliver and review the work with the stakeholder.
